responses.summary: CLAUDE_CODE_SDLC_WIZARD.md:881 autocompact table row changed from 'SDLC default (opus[1m])' to 'Opt-in SDLC setup (opus[1m])' with explicit '(see issue #198)' reference. Strengthened tests/test-doc-consistency.sh with a new grep-based regression test (test_wizard_doc_no_default_opus_1m_wording) that catches the exact anti-pattern — 'SDLC default (opus[1m])', 'default (opus[1m])', 'opus[1m] as default', 'opus[1m] is default'. Ran negative control: temporarily reverted the row, new test fails with 'Wizard doc contains contradictory default opus[1m] language'; restored, 22/22 pass.
